summary: Verified the 3 reported flows (chat, AI-generate quiz, flashcard rating) after fixes. All three primary flows pass end-to-end against the public URL. Chat now uses POST /api/chat/quiz (non-streaming) and renders the reply; AI-generate works without selecting a topic; flashcard rating persists confidence and next_review.
passed: Backend POST /api/chat/quiz with Bearer test_session_crystal_001 -> 200, returns {reply, session_id}
Backend POST /api/quiz/generate {topic:'Math', difficulty:3} -> 200, returns generated MCQ with options
Backend POST /api/flashcards/review {card_id, confidence:4} -> 200, next_review ~7 days out
GET /api/flashcards confirms confidence=4 persisted after UI rating click
UI /chat: typed 'What is 2+2?' -> POST /api/chat/quiz observed, reply rendered ('That's right, 2 + 2 is 4!'), no stuck thinking state, no call to /chat/stream
UI /quiz: AI-generate button is NOT disabled with 'All topics' (no topic) selected; click triggered POST /api/quiz/generate; quiz-card rendered (Momentum, difficulty 1/5)
UI /flashcards: existing card flipped, rate-<id>-4 button clicked, POST /api/flashcards/review observed, card flipped back to front, list reloaded with confidence=4 on that card
minor_observations: Could not visually confirm toast text 'Rated 4/5 / Next review in 7 days' because the assertion ran after the toast TTL elapsed; backend persistence + card flip-back confirm the flow works. Not a blocker.

Backend /api/quiz/generate raises 500 ValueError if a client sends difficulty as a non-numeric string (e.g. 'medium'). The current frontend sends difficulty:3 so this is not user-visible; consider coercing/validating in server.py for robustness.
